targets.query:
from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_state")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time"])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: now(),
      _value: if uint(v: now()) - uint(v: r._time) <= uint(v: 300000000000) then 1.0 else 0.0
    }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "confirmed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == true)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.satellite)
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: now(),
      _value: float(v: uint(v: now()) - uint(v: r._time)) / 1000000000.0,
      satellite: r.satellite
    }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "satellite"])

from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "confirmed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sat_lat_deg" or r._field == "sat_lon_deg" or r._field == "slant_range_km" or r._field == "sat_el_deg")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "satellite", "decode_status"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.sat_lat_deg and exists r.sat_lon_deg)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "satellite", "decode_status", "slant_range_km", "sat_el_deg", "sat_lat_deg", "sat_lon_deg"])
  |> rename(columns: {_time: "received_utc", decode_status: "status", slant_range_km: "distance_km", sat_el_deg: "elevation_deg", sat_lat_deg: "latitude", sat_lon_deg: "longitude"})
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["received_utc"], desc: true)

from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "crc_error")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sat_lat_deg" or r._field == "sat_lon_deg" or r._field == "slant_range_km" or r._field == "sat_el_deg")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "satellite", "decode_status"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.sat_lat_deg and exists r.sat_lon_deg)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "satellite", "decode_status", "slant_range_km", "sat_el_deg", "sat_lat_deg", "sat_lon_deg"])
  |> rename(columns: {_time: "received_utc", decode_status: "status", slant_range_km: "distance_km", sat_el_deg: "elevation_deg", sat_lat_deg: "latitude", sat_lon_deg: "longitude"})
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["received_utc"], desc: true)

import "array"

dynamic = from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "station_lat_deg" or r._field == "station_lon_deg")
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.station_lat_deg and exists r.station_lon_deg)
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      latitude: r.station_lat_deg,
      longitude: r.station_lon_deg,
      satellite: "Ground station",
      status: "station",
      distance_km: 0.0,
      elevation_deg: 0.0
    }))

fallback = array.from(rows: [{
  _time: time(v: 0),
  latitude: 49.831,
  longitude: 20.162,
  satellite: "Ground station",
  status: "station",
  distance_km: 0.0,
  elevation_deg: 0.0
}])

union(tables: [dynamic, fallback])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)

panels.title: RX map (satellite position at receive time)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "confirmed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == true)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.satellite)
  |> group(columns: ["satellite"])
  |> count(column: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["satellite", "_value"])
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: [], columnKey: ["satellite"], valueColumn: "_value")

from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "confirmed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == true)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.satellite)
  |> group(columns: ["satellite"])
  |> first()
  |> group()
  |> count(column: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: 0, stop: now())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_meta")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "unique_confirmed_all")
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "crc_error")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == true)
  |> group()
  |> count(column: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

frames = from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.satellite and exists r.decode_status)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "slant_range_km" or r._field == "sat_el_deg" or r._field == "snr_db" or r._field == "freq_error_hz" or r._field == "rssi_db")
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "satellite", "decode_status"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "satellite", "decode_status", "slant_range_km", "sat_el_deg", "snr_db", "freq_error_hz", "rssi_db"])

freq = from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "freq")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.satellite)
  |> group(columns: ["satellite"])
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["satellite", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "frequency_mhz"})

join(tables: {f: frames, s: freq}, on: ["satellite"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "satellite", "decode_status", "frequency_mhz", "freq_error_hz", "snr_db", "rssi_db", "slant_range_km", "sat_el_deg"])
  |> rename(columns: {_time: "Packet Received", satellite: "Satellite", decode_status: "Status", frequency_mhz: "Frequency", freq_error_hz: "Frequency Error", snr_db: "SNR", rssi_db: "RSSI", slant_range_km: "Distance", sat_el_deg: "Elevation"})
  |> keep(columns: ["Packet Received", "Satellite", "Frequency", "Frequency Error", "SNR", "RSSI", "Distance", "Elevation", "Status"])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["Packet Received"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 200)

from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "snr_db")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "confirmed")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "snr_db"})

from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "snr_db")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "crc_error")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "snr_db"})

from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "freq_error_hz")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "confirmed")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "freq_error_hz"})

from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "freq_error_hz")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "crc_error")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "freq_error_hz"})

from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rssi_db")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "confirmed")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "rssi_db"})

from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rssi_db")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "crc_error")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "rssi_db"})

import "strings"

frames = from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "snr_db" or r._field == "rssi_db" or r._field == "freq_error_hz")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.satellite and exists r.decode_status)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "confirmed" or r.decode_status == "crc_error")
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "satellite", "decode_status"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "satellite", "decode_status", "snr_db", "rssi_db", "freq_error_hz"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      satellite: r.satellite,
      decode_status: r.decode_status,
      sat_family: strings.split(v: r.satellite, t: "-")[0],
      snr_db: float(v: r.snr_db),
      rssi_db: float(v: r.rssi_db),
      abs_freq_error_hz: if float(v: r.freq_error_hz) < 0.0 then -1.0 * float(v: r.freq_error_hz) else float(v: r.freq_error_hz)
    }))

bw_exact = from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.satellite)
  |> group(columns: ["satellite"])
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["satellite", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "bw_khz"})

bw_family = from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "bw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.satellite)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      sat_family: strings.split(v: r.satellite, t: "-")[0],
      _value: r._value
    }))
  |> group(columns: ["sat_family"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> keep(columns: ["sat_family", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "bw_khz_family"})

exact = join(tables: {f: frames, b: bw_exact}, on: ["satellite"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      satellite: r.satellite,
      decode_status: r.decode_status,
      snr_db: r.snr_db,
      rssi_db: r.rssi_db,
      abs_freq_error_hz: r.abs_freq_error_hz,
      bw_khz: float(v: r.bw_khz),
      join_priority: 0.0
    }))

family = join(tables: {f: frames, b: bw_family}, on: ["sat_family"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      satellite: r.satellite,
      decode_status: r.decode_status,
      snr_db: r.snr_db,
      rssi_db: r.rssi_db,
      abs_freq_error_hz: r.abs_freq_error_hz,
      bw_khz: float(v: r.bw_khz_family),
      join_priority: 1.0
    }))

fallback = frames
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      satellite: r.satellite,
      decode_status: r.decode_status,
      snr_db: r.snr_db,
      rssi_db: r.rssi_db,
      abs_freq_error_hz: r.abs_freq_error_hz,
      bw_khz: 125.0,
      join_priority: 2.0
    }))

base = union(tables: [exact, family, fallback])
  |> group(columns: ["_time", "satellite", "decode_status"])
  |> sort(columns: ["join_priority"], desc: false)
  |> limit(n: 1)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      status: if r.decode_status == "confirmed" then "CONFIRMED" else "CRC ERROR",
      snr_db: r.snr_db,
      rssi_db: r.rssi_db,
      abs_freq_error_hz: r.abs_freq_error_hz,
      bw_khz: r.bw_khz,
      freq_error_pct_bw: if r.bw_khz > 0.0 then (r.abs_freq_error_hz / (r.bw_khz * 1000.0)) * 100.0 else 0.0
    }))

by_status = base |> group(columns: ["status"])
all_status = base
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      status: "ALL",
      snr_db: r.snr_db,
      rssi_db: r.rssi_db,
      abs_freq_error_hz: r.abs_freq_error_hz,
      bw_khz: r.bw_khz,
      freq_error_pct_bw: r.freq_error_pct_bw
    }))
  |> group(columns: ["status"])

stats_src = union(tables: [by_status, all_status])

count_by_status = stats_src
  |> count(column: "snr_db")
  |> keep(columns: ["status", "snr_db"])
  |> rename(columns: {snr_db: "Packets"})

snr_mean = stats_src
  |> mean(column: "snr_db")
  |> keep(columns: ["status", "snr_db"])
  |> rename(columns: {snr_db: "SNR avg [dB]"})

snr_median = stats_src
  |> median(column: "snr_db")
  |> keep(columns: ["status", "snr_db"])
  |> rename(columns: {snr_db: "SNR median [dB]"})

rssi_mean = stats_src
  |> mean(column: "rssi_db")
  |> keep(columns: ["status", "rssi_db"])
  |> rename(columns: {rssi_db: "RSSI avg [dB]"})

rssi_median = stats_src
  |> median(column: "rssi_db")
  |> keep(columns: ["status", "rssi_db"])
  |> rename(columns: {rssi_db: "RSSI median [dB]"})

ferr_mean = stats_src
  |> mean(column: "abs_freq_error_hz")
  |> keep(columns: ["status", "abs_freq_error_hz"])
  |> rename(columns: {abs_freq_error_hz: "|Freq error| avg [Hz]"})

ferr_median = stats_src
  |> median(column: "abs_freq_error_hz")
  |> keep(columns: ["status", "abs_freq_error_hz"])
  |> rename(columns: {abs_freq_error_hz: "|Freq error| median [Hz]"})

ferr_pct_mean = stats_src
  |> mean(column: "freq_error_pct_bw")
  |> keep(columns: ["status", "freq_error_pct_bw"])
  |> rename(columns: {freq_error_pct_bw: "|Freq error| avg [% BW]"})

ferr_pct_median = stats_src
  |> median(column: "freq_error_pct_bw")
  |> keep(columns: ["status", "freq_error_pct_bw"])
  |> rename(columns: {freq_error_pct_bw: "|Freq error| median [% BW]"})

bw_median = stats_src
  |> median(column: "bw_khz")
  |> keep(columns: ["status", "bw_khz"])
  |> rename(columns: {bw_khz: "BW median [kHz]"})

join01 = join(tables: {a: count_by_status, b: snr_mean}, on: ["status"])
join02 = join(tables: {a: join01, b: snr_median}, on: ["status"])
join03 = join(tables: {a: join02, b: rssi_mean}, on: ["status"])
join04 = join(tables: {a: join03, b: rssi_median}, on: ["status"])
join05 = join(tables: {a: join04, b: ferr_mean}, on: ["status"])
join06 = join(tables: {a: join05, b: ferr_median}, on: ["status"])
join07 = join(tables: {a: join06, b: ferr_pct_mean}, on: ["status"])
join08 = join(tables: {a: join07, b: ferr_pct_median}, on: ["status"])
join09 = join(tables: {a: join08, b: bw_median}, on: ["status"])

join09
  |> rename(columns: {status: "Status"})
  |> keep(columns: ["Status", "Packets", "SNR avg [dB]", "SNR median [dB]", "RSSI avg [dB]", "RSSI median [dB]", "|Freq error| avg [Hz]", "|Freq error| median [Hz]", "|Freq error| avg [% BW]", "|Freq error| median [% BW]", "BW median [kHz]"])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["Status"], desc: false)

from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "confirmed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sat_el_deg" or r._field == "snr_db")
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "satellite", "decode_status"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.sat_el_deg and exists r.snr_db)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sat_el_deg >= 0.0 and r.sat_el_deg <= 90.0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      el_bin_low: float(v: int(v: r.sat_el_deg / 5.0) * 5),
      snr_db: float(v: r.snr_db)
    }))
  |> group(columns: ["el_bin_low"])
  |> median(column: "snr_db")
  |> keep(columns: ["el_bin_low", "snr_db"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      order: r.el_bin_low,
      Elevation: string(v: int(v: r.el_bin_low)) + "-" + string(v: int(v: r.el_bin_low + 4.0)) + "°",
      Median_SNR_dB: r.snr_db
    }))
  |> sort(columns: ["order"], desc: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["Elevation", "Median_SNR_dB"])

from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "confirmed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sat_el_deg" or r._field == "snr_db")
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "satellite", "decode_status"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.sat_el_deg and exists r.snr_db)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sat_el_deg >= 0.0 and r.sat_el_deg <= 90.0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      el_bin_low: float(v: int(v: r.sat_el_deg / 5.0) * 5),
      one: 1.0
    }))
  |> group(columns: ["el_bin_low"])
  |> sum(column: "one")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      order: r.el_bin_low,
      Elevation: string(v: int(v: r.el_bin_low)) + "-" + string(v: int(v: r.el_bin_low + 4.0)) + "°",
      Packets: r.one
    }))
  |> sort(columns: ["order"], desc: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["Elevation", "Packets"])

from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "confirmed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "slant_range_km" or r._field == "snr_db")
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "satellite", "decode_status"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.slant_range_km and exists r.snr_db)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.slant_range_km >= 0.0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      dist_bin_low: float(v: int(v: r.slant_range_km / 100.0) * 100),
      snr_db: float(v: r.snr_db)
    }))
  |> group(columns: ["dist_bin_low"])
  |> median(column: "snr_db")
  |> keep(columns: ["dist_bin_low", "snr_db"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      order: r.dist_bin_low,
      Distance: string(v: int(v: r.dist_bin_low)) + "-" + string(v: int(v: r.dist_bin_low + 99.0)) + " km",
      Median_SNR_dB: r.snr_db
    }))
  |> sort(columns: ["order"], desc: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["Distance", "Median_SNR_dB"])

from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "confirmed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "slant_range_km" or r._field == "snr_db")
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "satellite", "decode_status"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.slant_range_km and exists r.snr_db)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.slant_range_km >= 0.0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      dist_bin_low: float(v: int(v: r.slant_range_km / 100.0) * 100),
      one: 1.0
    }))
  |> group(columns: ["dist_bin_low"])
  |> sum(column: "one")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      order: r.dist_bin_low,
      Distance: string(v: int(v: r.dist_bin_low)) + "-" + string(v: int(v: r.dist_bin_low + 99.0)) + " km",
      Packets: r.one
    }))
  |> sort(columns: ["order"], desc: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["Distance", "Packets"])

panels.title: CONFIRMED packets by distance (100 km bins)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "confirmed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sat_el_deg" or r._field == "rssi_db")
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "satellite", "decode_status"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.sat_el_deg and exists r.rssi_db)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.sat_el_deg >= 0.0 and r.sat_el_deg <= 90.0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      el_bin_low: float(v: int(v: r.sat_el_deg / 5.0) * 5),
      rssi_db: float(v: r.rssi_db)
    }))
  |> group(columns: ["el_bin_low"])
  |> median(column: "rssi_db")
  |> keep(columns: ["el_bin_low", "rssi_db"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      order: r.el_bin_low,
      Elevation: string(v: int(v: r.el_bin_low)) + "-" + string(v: int(v: r.el_bin_low + 4.0)) + "°",
      Median_RSSI_dB: r.rssi_db
    }))
  |> sort(columns: ["order"], desc: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["Elevation", "Median_RSSI_dB"])

norad_key = (s) => "NORAD:" + string(v: int(v: float(v: s)))

state_seen_raw = from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "state_seen")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == true)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.tracked_norad)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      norad_key: norad_key(s: r.tracked_norad)
    }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "norad_key"])

state_freq_raw = from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "freq")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.tracked_norad)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      norad_key: norad_key(s: r.tracked_norad),
      freq_mhz: float(v: r._value)
    }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "norad_key", "freq_mhz"])

state = join(tables: {s: state_seen_raw, f: state_freq_raw}, on: ["_time", "norad_key"])
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "norad_key", "freq_mhz"])
  |> group(columns: ["norad_key"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)

confirmed = from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "confirmed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "confirmed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value == true)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.tracked_norad)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      norad_key: norad_key(s: r.tracked_norad)
    }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "norad_key"])

state_first = state
  |> first(column: "freq_mhz")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      norad_key: r.norad_key,
      freq_mhz: r.freq_mhz,
      new_pass: 0.0,
      source: "state"
    }))

state_other = state
  |> elapsed(unit: 1s)
  |> rename(columns: {elapsed: "elapsed_s"})
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      norad_key: r.norad_key,
      freq_mhz: r.freq_mhz,
      new_pass: if float(v: r.elapsed_s) > 900.0 then 1.0 else 0.0,
      source: "state"
    }))

state_rows = union(tables: [state_first, state_other])

confirmed_rows = confirmed
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      norad_key: r.norad_key,
      freq_mhz: -1.0,
      new_pass: 0.0,
      source: "confirmed"
    }))

timeline = union(tables: [state_rows, confirmed_rows])
  |> group(columns: ["norad_key"])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: false)
  |> cumulativeSum(columns: ["new_pass"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      norad_key: r.norad_key,
      pass_id: string(v: int(v: r.new_pass)),
      freq_mhz: r.freq_mhz,
      source: r.source
    }))

pass_band = timeline
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.source == "state")
  |> group(columns: ["norad_key", "pass_id"])
  |> last(column: "freq_mhz")
  |> keep(columns: ["norad_key", "pass_id", "freq_mhz"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      norad_key: r.norad_key,
      pass_id: r.pass_id,
      Band: string(v: int(v: float(v: r.freq_mhz) / 10.0) * 10) + "-" + string(v: int(v: float(v: r.freq_mhz) / 10.0) * 10 + 9) + " MHz"
    }))

pass_status0 = pass_band
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({norad_key: r.norad_key, pass_id: r.pass_id, has_confirmed: 0.0}))

pass_status_hit = timeline
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.source == "confirmed")
  |> group(columns: ["norad_key", "pass_id"])
  |> first(column: "source")
  |> keep(columns: ["norad_key", "pass_id"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({norad_key: r.norad_key, pass_id: r.pass_id, has_confirmed: 1.0}))

pass_status = union(tables: [pass_status0, pass_status_hit])
  |> group(columns: ["norad_key", "pass_id"])
  |> max(column: "has_confirmed")

join(tables: {s: pass_status, b: pass_band}, on: ["norad_key", "pass_id"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      Band: r.Band,
      CONFIRMED: if r.has_confirmed > 0.0 then 1.0 else 0.0,
      NOT_CONFIRMED: if r.has_confirmed > 0.0 then 0.0 else 1.0
    }))
  |> group(columns: ["Band"])
  |> reduce(
      identity: {CONFIRMED: 0.0, NOT_CONFIRMED: 0.0},
      fn: (r, accumulator) => ({
        CONFIRMED: accumulator.CONFIRMED + r.CONFIRMED,
        NOT_CONFIRMED: accumulator.NOT_CONFIRMED + r.NOT_CONFIRMED
      })
    )
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      Band: r.Band,
      CONFIRMED: r.CONFIRMED,
      NOT_CONFIRMED: r.NOT_CONFIRMED,
      Total: r.CONFIRMED + r.NOT_CONFIRMED,
      Success_pct: if (r.CONFIRMED + r.NOT_CONFIRMED) > 0.0 then (r.CONFIRMED / (r.CONFIRMED + r.NOT_CONFIRMED)) * 100.0 else 0.0
    }))
  |> keep(columns: ["Band", "CONFIRMED", "NOT_CONFIRMED", "Total", "Success_pct"])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["Band"], desc: false)

norad_id = (s) => string(v: int(v: float(v: s)))
pass_key = (norad, aos_s, los_s) => norad + "|" + string(v: int(v: aos_s)) + "|" + string(v: int(v: los_s))

state_passes = from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tle_pass_max_el_deg" or r._field == "tle_pass_aos_unix_s" or r._field == "tle_pass_los_unix_s")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.tracked_norad)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "tracked_norad"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.tle_pass_max_el_deg and exists r.tle_pass_aos_unix_s and exists r.tle_pass_los_unix_s)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      norad_id: norad_id(s: r.tracked_norad),
      pass_key: pass_key(
        norad: norad_id(s: r.tracked_norad),
        aos_s: float(v: r.tle_pass_aos_unix_s),
        los_s: float(v: r.tle_pass_los_unix_s)
      ),
      max_el_deg: float(v: r.tle_pass_max_el_deg),
      pass_aos_s: float(v: r.tle_pass_aos_unix_s),
      pass_los_s: float(v: r.tle_pass_los_unix_s)
    }))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.max_el_deg >= 0.0 and r.max_el_deg <= 90.0 and r.pass_los_s >= r.pass_aos_s)
  |> group(columns: ["norad_id", "pass_key"])
  |> max(column: "max_el_deg")
  |> keep(columns: ["norad_id", "pass_key", "max_el_deg"])

confirmed_passes = from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "confirmed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tle_pass_aos_unix_s" or r._field == "tle_pass_los_unix_s")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.tracked_norad)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "tracked_norad"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.tle_pass_aos_unix_s and exists r.tle_pass_los_unix_s)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      norad_id: norad_id(s: r.tracked_norad),
      pass_key: pass_key(
        norad: norad_id(s: r.tracked_norad),
        aos_s: float(v: r.tle_pass_aos_unix_s),
        los_s: float(v: r.tle_pass_los_unix_s)
      ),
      has_confirmed: 1.0
    }))
  |> group(columns: ["norad_id", "pass_key"])
  |> max(column: "has_confirmed")

pass_status0 = state_passes
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({norad_id: r.norad_id, pass_key: r.pass_key, has_confirmed: 0.0}))

pass_status = union(tables: [pass_status0, confirmed_passes])
  |> group(columns: ["norad_id", "pass_key"])
  |> max(column: "has_confirmed")

pass_labeled = join(tables: {p: state_passes, s: pass_status}, on: ["norad_id", "pass_key"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      max_el_deg: r.max_el_deg,
      CONFIRMED: if r.has_confirmed > 0.0 then 1.0 else 0.0,
      NOT_CONFIRMED: if r.has_confirmed > 0.0 then 0.0 else 1.0
    }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      bin_low: float(v: int(v: r.max_el_deg / 10.0) * 10),
      CONFIRMED: r.CONFIRMED,
      NOT_CONFIRMED: r.NOT_CONFIRMED
    }))

pass_labeled
  |> group(columns: ["bin_low"])
  |> reduce(
      identity: {CONFIRMED: 0.0, NOT_CONFIRMED: 0.0},
      fn: (r, accumulator) => ({
        CONFIRMED: accumulator.CONFIRMED + r.CONFIRMED,
        NOT_CONFIRMED: accumulator.NOT_CONFIRMED + r.NOT_CONFIRMED
      })
    )
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      order: r.bin_low,
      Max_elevation_bin: string(v: int(v: r.bin_low)) + "-" + string(v: int(v: r.bin_low + 9.0)) + "°",
      CONFIRMED: r.CONFIRMED,
      NOT_CONFIRMED: r.NOT_CONFIRMED
    }))
  |> sort(columns: ["order"], desc: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["Max_elevation_bin", "CONFIRMED", "NOT_CONFIRMED"])

panels.title: Passes by max elevation bin (begine, frame-preferred elevation)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "confirmed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "slant_range_km" or r._field == "rssi_db")
  |> group()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "satellite", "decode_status"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.slant_range_km and exists r.rssi_db)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.slant_range_km >= 0.0)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      dist_bin_low: float(v: int(v: r.slant_range_km / 100.0) * 100),
      rssi_db: float(v: r.rssi_db)
    }))
  |> group(columns: ["dist_bin_low"])
  |> median(column: "rssi_db")
  |> keep(columns: ["dist_bin_low", "rssi_db"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      order: r.dist_bin_low,
      Distance: string(v: int(v: r.dist_bin_low)) + "-" + string(v: int(v: r.dist_bin_low + 99.0)) + " km",
      Median_RSSI_dB: r.rssi_db
    }))
  |> sort(columns: ["order"], desc: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["Distance", "Median_RSSI_dB"])

norad_id = (s) => string(v: int(v: float(v: s)))
pass_key = (norad, aos_s, los_s) => norad + "|" + string(v: int(v: aos_s)) + "|" + string(v: int(v: los_s))

state_passes = from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tle_pass_max_el_deg" or r._field == "tle_pass_aos_unix_s" or r._field == "tle_pass_los_unix_s")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.tracked_norad)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "tracked_norad"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.tle_pass_max_el_deg and exists r.tle_pass_aos_unix_s and exists r.tle_pass_los_unix_s)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      norad_id: norad_id(s: r.tracked_norad),
      pass_key: pass_key(
        norad: norad_id(s: r.tracked_norad),
        aos_s: float(v: r.tle_pass_aos_unix_s),
        los_s: float(v: r.tle_pass_los_unix_s)
      ),
      max_el_deg: float(v: r.tle_pass_max_el_deg),
      pass_aos_s: float(v: r.tle_pass_aos_unix_s),
      pass_los_s: float(v: r.tle_pass_los_unix_s)
    }))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.max_el_deg >= 0.0 and r.max_el_deg <= 90.0 and r.pass_los_s >= r.pass_aos_s)
  |> group(columns: ["norad_id", "pass_key"])
  |> max(column: "max_el_deg")
  |> keep(columns: ["norad_id", "pass_key", "max_el_deg"])

confirmed_passes = from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "confirmed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tle_pass_aos_unix_s" or r._field == "tle_pass_los_unix_s")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.tracked_norad)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "tracked_norad"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.tle_pass_aos_unix_s and exists r.tle_pass_los_unix_s)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      norad_id: norad_id(s: r.tracked_norad),
      pass_key: pass_key(
        norad: norad_id(s: r.tracked_norad),
        aos_s: float(v: r.tle_pass_aos_unix_s),
        los_s: float(v: r.tle_pass_los_unix_s)
      ),
      has_confirmed: 1.0
    }))
  |> group(columns: ["norad_id", "pass_key"])
  |> max(column: "has_confirmed")

pass_status0 = state_passes
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({norad_id: r.norad_id, pass_key: r.pass_key, has_confirmed: 0.0}))

pass_status = union(tables: [pass_status0, confirmed_passes])
  |> group(columns: ["norad_id", "pass_key"])
  |> max(column: "has_confirmed")

pass_labeled = join(tables: {p: state_passes, s: pass_status}, on: ["norad_id", "pass_key"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      max_el_deg: r.max_el_deg,
      CONFIRMED: if r.has_confirmed > 0.0 then 1.0 else 0.0,
      NOT_CONFIRMED: if r.has_confirmed > 0.0 then 0.0 else 1.0
    }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      bin_low: float(v: int(v: r.max_el_deg / 10.0) * 10),
      CONFIRMED: r.CONFIRMED,
      NOT_CONFIRMED: r.NOT_CONFIRMED
    }))

pass_labeled
  |> group(columns: ["bin_low"])
  |> reduce(
      identity: {CONFIRMED: 0.0, NOT_CONFIRMED: 0.0},
      fn: (r, accumulator) => ({
        CONFIRMED: accumulator.CONFIRMED + r.CONFIRMED,
        NOT_CONFIRMED: accumulator.NOT_CONFIRMED + r.NOT_CONFIRMED
      })
    )
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      order: r.bin_low,
      Max_elevation_bin: string(v: int(v: r.bin_low)) + "-" + string(v: int(v: r.bin_low + 9.0)) + "°",
      Confirmed_probability_pct: if (r.CONFIRMED + r.NOT_CONFIRMED) > 0.0 then (r.CONFIRMED / (r.CONFIRMED + r.NOT_CONFIRMED)) * 100.0 else 0.0
    }))
  |> sort(columns: ["order"], desc: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["Max_elevation_bin", "Confirmed_probability_pct"])

panels.title: Confirmed Reception Probability by Max Pass Elevation

  {norad_id: "66780", sat_name_tle: "FossaSat-2E24"},
  {norad_id: "67261", sat_name_tle: "Grifon-4"},
  {norad_id: "67262", sat_name_tle: "ANSAT-1"},
  {norad_id: "67264", sat_name_tle: "KOSAR 1.5 433"},
  {norad_id: "67268", sat_name_tle: "MorSat-1"},
  {norad_id: "67272", sat_name_tle: "Grifon-2"},
  {norad_id: "67274", sat_name_tle: "AIST-ST"},
  {norad_id: "67275", sat_name_tle: "SM-3.1"},
  {norad_id: "67276", sat_name_tle: "VM-3.1"},
  {norad_id: "67277", sat_name_tle: "Vladivostok-2"},
  {norad_id: "67280", sat_name_tle: "Grifon-3"},
  {norad_id: "67281", sat_name_tle: "Grifon-1"},
  {norad_id: "67284", sat_name_tle: "Lobachevsky"},
  {norad_id: "67286", sat_name_tle: "Mule 4T"},
  {norad_id: "67390", sat_name_tle: "ConnectaIoT-16"},
  {norad_id: "67400", sat_name_tle: "ConnectaIoT-13"},
  {norad_id: "67401", sat_name_tle: "ConnectaIoT-14"},
  {norad_id: "67402", sat_name_tle: "ConnectaIoT-15"}
])
  |> group()

pass_key = (norad, aos_s, los_s) => norad + "|" + string(v: int(v: aos_s)) + "|" + string(v: int(v: los_s))

state_samples = from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tle_pass_max_el_deg" or r._field == "tle_pass_aos_unix_s" or r._field == "tle_pass_los_unix_s")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.tracked_norad)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "tracked_norad"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.tle_pass_max_el_deg and exists r.tle_pass_aos_unix_s and exists r.tle_pass_los_unix_s)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      norad_id: norad_id(s: r.tracked_norad),
      pass_aos_s: float(v: r.tle_pass_aos_unix_s),
      pass_los_s: float(v: r.tle_pass_los_unix_s),
      max_el_deg: float(v: r.tle_pass_max_el_deg)
    }))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.max_el_deg >= 0.0 and r.max_el_deg <= 90.0 and r.pass_los_s >= r.pass_aos_s)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      norad_id: r.norad_id,
      pass_key: pass_key(norad: r.norad_id, aos_s: r.pass_aos_s, los_s: r.pass_los_s),
      pass_aos_s: r.pass_aos_s,
      pass_los_s: r.pass_los_s,
      max_el_deg: r.max_el_deg
    }))

pass_max = state_samples
  |> group(columns: ["norad_id", "pass_key"])
  |> max(column: "max_el_deg")
  |> keep(columns: ["norad_id", "pass_key", "max_el_deg"])

pass_aos = state_samples
  |> group(columns: ["norad_id", "pass_key"])
  |> min(column: "pass_aos_s")
  |> keep(columns: ["norad_id", "pass_key", "pass_aos_s"])

pass_los = state_samples
  |> group(columns: ["norad_id", "pass_key"])
  |> max(column: "pass_los_s")
  |> keep(columns: ["norad_id", "pass_key", "pass_los_s"])

pass_core = join(tables: {m: pass_max, a: pass_aos}, on: ["norad_id", "pass_key"])

passes = join(tables: {p: pass_core, l: pass_los}, on: ["norad_id", "pass_key"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      norad_id: r.norad_id,
      pass_key: r.pass_key,
      max_el_deg: r.max_el_deg,
      pass_start_utc: time(v: int(v: r.pass_aos_s * 1000000000.0)),
      pass_end_utc: time(v: int(v: r.pass_los_s * 1000000000.0))
    }))

confirmed_passes = from(bucket: "tinygs")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "tinygs_frame")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.decode_status == "confirmed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tle_pass_aos_unix_s" or r._field == "tle_pass_los_unix_s")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.tracked_norad)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time", "tracked_norad"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.tle_pass_aos_unix_s and exists r.tle_pass_los_unix_s)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      norad_id: norad_id(s: r.tracked_norad),
      pass_key: pass_key(
        norad: norad_id(s: r.tracked_norad),
        aos_s: float(v: r.tle_pass_aos_unix_s),
        los_s: float(v: r.tle_pass_los_unix_s)
      ),
      has_confirmed: 1.0
    }))
  |> group(columns: ["norad_id", "pass_key"])
  |> max(column: "has_confirmed")

pass_status0 = passes
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({norad_id: r.norad_id, pass_key: r.pass_key, has_confirmed: 0.0}))

pass_status = union(tables: [pass_status0, confirmed_passes])
  |> group(columns: ["norad_id", "pass_key"])
  |> max(column: "has_confirmed")

pass_labeled = join(tables: {p: passes, s: pass_status}, on: ["norad_id", "pass_key"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      norad_id: r.norad_id,
      max_el_deg: r.max_el_deg,
      pass_start_utc: r.pass_start_utc,
      pass_end_utc: r.pass_end_utc,
      pass_status: if r.has_confirmed > 0.0 then "CONFIRMED" else "NOT_CONFIRMED"
    }))
  |> group()

join(tables: {p: pass_labeled, n: norad_catalog}, on: ["norad_id"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      NORAD: r.norad_id,
      Satellite: r.sat_name_tle,
      Pass_status: r.pass_status,
      Max_elevation_deg: r.max_el_deg,
      Pass_from_utc: r.pass_start_utc,
      Pass_to_utc: r.pass_end_utc
    }))
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["Pass_from_utc"], desc: true)
